rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, August 12, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT HUTTIG BUILDING PRODUCTS, INC. AS ALLEGED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Off Calendar, per moving party. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: RICK W GRIMSLEY VS. MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, August 12, 2009, line 2, PLAINTIFF RICK GRIMSLEY MOTION TO STRIKE. Motion to strike denied. Defendants are the prevailing parties and entitled to their costs. Defendants consistently stated that plaintiff was only entitled to Two million dollars and plaintiff obtained nothing from this action. The challenged costs appear reasonable. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SWIVEL MEDIA, INC. VS. KYLE L. MCNEELY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Deft'S Appeal Of The Order, Decision Or Award Of The Labor Commissioner Or In The Alternative For An Order To Post Bond By Date Certain And For Entry Of Judgment On The Oda
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, August 12, 2009, line 10, RESPONDENT KYLE MCNEELY Motion To Dismiss Defendant's Appeal Of The Order, Decision Or Award Of The Labor Commissioner Or In The Alternative For An Order To Post Bond By Date Certain And For Entry Of Judgment. Motion for an Order to post bond by date certain is granted. Defendant/Appellant must post a bond in the amount of $41,151.19 on or before August 19, 2009. (Labor Code section 98.2(b).) Request for attorney's fees denied without prejudice. =(302/CWW)
